text: Session memory: Context injection on startup
description:
When watchdog starts, load compressed memories.

Implementation: ~4 hours
1. Read recent session summaries from .bowman/memory/sessions/
2. Format as condensed context (limit: 2000 tokens)
3. Prepend to INSTRUCT.md as "Previous Session Insights"
4. Example format:
   ```
   ## What You've Learned
   Session 2024-02-15: Struggled with value calculation bugs → learned to write tests first
   Session 2024-02-16: Refactored ui.ts successfully → clearer boundaries improve maintainability
   Recurring pattern: Over-engineering initial implementations → start simple, iterate
   ```

Enables continuity across sessions - agent "remembers" its past.
